'''karawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chabutra|chabutra]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chabutra|chabutra]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| karawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæræwæth|kæræwæth]] || [[word:kæræwæj|kæræwæj]] || [[word:kæræwæsh|kæræwæsh]] || [[word:kæræwæ|kæræwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kararawath|kararawath]] || [[word:kararawaj|kararawaj]] || [[word:kararawash|kararawash]] || [[word:kararawa|kararawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:karawath|karawath]] || [[word:karawaj|karawaj]] || [[word:karawash|karawash]] || [[word:karawa|karawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:karafwath|karafwath]] || [[word:karafwaj|karafwaj]] || [[word:karafwash|karafwash]] || [[word:karafwaf|karafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:karawatha|karawatha]] || [[word:karawaja|karawaja]] || [[word:karawasha|karawasha]] || [[word:karawaka|karawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:karawath|karawath]] || [[word:karawaj|karawaj]] || [[word:karawash|karawash]] || [[word:karawa|karawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:karawathal|karawathal]] || [[word:karawajal|karawajal]] || [[word:karawashal|karawashal]] || [[word:karawakal|karawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:karawathatha|karawathatha]] || [[word:karawajaja|karawajaja]] || [[word:karawashasha|karawashasha]] || [[word:karawaka|karawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:karawathan|karawathan]] || [[word:karawajan|karawajan]] || [[word:karawashan|karawashan]] || [[word:karawakan|karawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:karawathaoro|karawathaoro]] || [[word:karawajaoro|karawajaoro]] || [[word:karawashaoro|karawashaoro]] || [[word:karawakaoro|karawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
